description_long: This is a tall, slender aluminum can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly domed top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with bold white script reading 'Coca-Cola' wrapping around the body, and additional branding and product information in white text. The top features a metallic pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of beverage cans. Nutritional and recycling information, as well as a barcode, are printed on the back in white. The can appears to be a 250 ml size, commonly used for soft drinks. The surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way characteristic of coated metal cans.
description: A tall, slim red Coca-Cola can with white branding and a metallic pull-tab top, featuring smooth, glossy aluminum surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, iconic white 'Coca-Cola' script on a red background, with the top rim and pull-tab visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the volume (250 ml), ingredients, and nutritional information in white text, with part of the logo visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing detailed product information, barcode, recycling symbols, and smaller branding elements.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the continuation of the 'Coca-Cola' script and a partial view of the barcode and product details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white 'Coca-Cola' script logo on red background, 'SABOR ORIGINAL' text at the top, nutritional and recycling information, barcode, and smaller branding elements in white.
